recommended_release_title: Salesforce Coding v1.4.0 - Knowledge And Onboarding Expansion

after.source: final audit estimate after Batch 1 through Batch 5

files_changed_summary: Salesforce knowledge guides, topics, prompts, checklists, command maps, parameter maps, quality strategies, and validation flows
Tooling, quality gate, and automation docs/scripts
Workspace batch reports and final audit reports
knowledge_gaps_closed: Apex structure, triggers, tests, async, SOQL/DML, and security posture
Salesforce Files lifecycle and mobile/file/PDF handoff
LWC data access, templates, navigation, toasts, dynamic fields, and mobile behavior
Visualforce PDF constraints and generated file handoff
Metadata source format, FlexiPages, layouts, quick actions, permissions, package.xml, and destructive deployment safety
Deployment validation, CLI command routing, debug-log triage, Code Analyzer guidance, and no-success-without-evidence behavior
Codex prompt and checklist behavior controls
New-user onboarding from release ZIP through Memory/History updates
remaining_gaps: No real Salesforce DX project was present, so project-specific tests, lint, analyzer, deploy, retrieve, mobile runtime, and Visualforce PDF validation were not run
Named credentials and external credentials do not yet have a dedicated topic page
Flow interaction with Apex/LWC does not yet have a dedicated topic page
Prompt effectiveness needs real task feedback
Version-sensitive CLI and Code Analyzer behavior should be verified against installed help before mutating commands
GitHub Release publishing still requires owner action

public_docs_local_path_private_data_scan.scope: scanned repo text including sanitized workspace reports

bash_syntax_check.reason: bash is not available in this PowerShell environment

leftover_directory_scan.result: no node_modules, copied .git folders, optional external clone folders, zip extraction temp folders, or zip files found

copied_source_marker_scan.note: source-like markers are generic public-safe examples in knowledge docs, not copied external source

ready_to_commit.reason: The downloaded release folder was mirrored into the real git checkout and the staged diff passed pre-commit checks

recommended_next_step: Commit and push the staged knowledge-base improvement, then prepare v1.4.0 release notes, tag, and create the GitHub Release if ready.
